hooks.command: command -v bridge-mcp >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'Bridge MCP ready. Use /bridge-mcp:bridge to manage remote hosts, or /bridge-mcp:discover to explore 357 tools.' || { echo '⚠️  bridge-mcp binary not found — auto-installing (prebuilt download)…'; BRIDGE_MCP_BOOTSTRAP_AUTO=1 bash "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/install.sh"; }
